spandrel-extra-arches>=0.1.0

# Bundles a static ffmpeg binary used to transcode generated videos to browser-playable
# H.264 (accessed via imageio_ffmpeg.get_ffmpeg_exe()). A real dependency — not a scavenged path.
imageio-ffmpeg>=0.5.1
facexlib>=0.3.0
compel>=2.0.0
ftfy>=6.1.0
gguf>=0.19.0
# SageAttention — auto-installed by launch.py on first run (RTX 30/40-series, 2-4x Wan step speed).
# Comfy --use-sage-attention parity. Not listed as a bare pip dep because it needs a
# matching CUDA/Triton build; launch.py installs it with graceful failure.
# Manual install: pip install "sageattention>=2.1.1" triton-windows
# Skip auto-install: pass --skip-sageattention to launch.py
#
# Optional — faster Wan attention when buildable on your CUDA toolchain:
# pip install flash-attn
torchsde>=0.2.6
segment-anything>=1.0
scipy>=1.10.0

# Optional — AMD/Intel GPU on Windows: pip install torch-directml, then
# enable DirectML in Settings -> Launch profile. (Linux AMD: install the
# ROCm torch build instead; it shows up as CUDA automatically.)

# Optional — Face Swap (ReActor). Install to enable the Face Swap tab.
# onnxruntime-gpu for NVIDIA; onnxruntime for CPU-only.
insightface>=0.7.3
onnxruntime>=1.17.0
